age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation is relaxable in accordance with GOI instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC with 8 Years experience
qualification.details: MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC with 8 Years experience. Desirable: MD/MS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC or MPH from a recognised university or Ph.D. from a recognised University in a subject related to Biomedical sciences.

salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 78800 - 209200 Per Month (Level 12 of Pay Matrix)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR Scientist D Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR Scientist D Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR Scientist-D (Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the ICMR Scientist-D (Medical) recruitment is 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Scientist-D (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Scientist-D (Medical) post announced by ICMR.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientist-D (Medical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS or equivalent degree recognized by MCI/NMC with 8 years of experience. A Master's degree or Ph.D. in a related field is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Scientist-D (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Scientist-D (Medical) post is 45 years, with relaxations applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1500/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Scientist-D (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 78,800 to Rs. 2,09,200 per month, as per Level 12 of the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a computer-based test (MCQs) followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the ICMR Scientist-D (Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official ICMR website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
